prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDRUSHKIT-11PC-BUNDLE Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens, 1/2 and 1/8 Coarse Mesh, Snifter Bottle, Vials, Finishing Gold Pans Description: Whether you're a new gold panning hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector, the ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit includes essential gold mining tools that will prepare you to properly, and successfully, sort, classify and store recovered gold flakes, gold nuggets, gems or other precious metals from your deposit. The ASR Outdoor 11pc gold panning kit includes the following equipment: two glass screw top storage vials, magnifying tweezers, two regular 10 inch gold pans, one plastic snifter bottle, one plastic shovel scoop, one large 14 inch gold pan, a magnetic separator pick up tool, one small 8 inch gold pan, one 1/2 inch mesh classifying screen and one 1/8 inch mesh classifying screen.

Essential to successful gold prospecting are reliable riffled gold pans and classifier sieves or screens; the ASR Outdoor gold pans included in this kit are constructed from heavy duty plastic with feature a unique riffle design; the pans also come in a high contrast deep green color to help spot gold. The classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire, making them rust resistant and conveniently, the screens fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket for additional classifying as needed.

And, should you be so lucky to recover gold flakes or gold nuggets, reach for the mini LED flashlight, magnifying tweezers, snifter bottles and glass vials; these tools have been thoughtfully selected to help and allow for easy and convenient onsite extraction, examination and storage of found gold.

All the equipment included in this complete gold panning kit are made from quality materials; from the high impact, plastic classifier screens and gold pans, to the durable metal magnifying tweezers, multipurpose scoop and trusty snifter bottle, all the components will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come. Search Terms: gold mining equipment kit for adults prospecting wash pan beginners hobby activities sifting pan screen classifiers snuffer Features: - DURABLE ABS ENGINEERED MATERIALS: Designed to be tough, unlike bargin brand prospector tools and accessories; these are ASR Outdoor high impact, durable plastic classifier screens, gold pans and shovel scoop, to the metal magnifying tweezers and trusty magnetic pick up tool, all the components of this gold panning kit will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come - 11PC GOLD PANNING KIT: Whether you're a new gold panning hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector, the ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit includes essential gold mining tools that will prepare you to classify, pan and store recovered gold, gems or other found specimens - MUST HAVE GOLD PANS: Essential to successful gold prospecting are reliable riffled pans and classifier screens; the ASR Outdoor gold pans included in this kit are constructed from heavy duty plastic and come in a deep high contrast green color to help better spot gold; the classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire and conveniently fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket - GOLD PROSPECTING ACCESSORIES: The magnifying tweezers, snifter bottle and glass vials will be convenient to reach for if you're lucky enough to pan some gold flakes or gold nuggets, gems or other precious metals from your deposit! These tools will allow you to extract, examine and store your newly discovered specimens when on site and keep them safe and secure - YOUR MINING KIT INCLUDES: (2)10 inch gold pans, plastic snifter bottle, scoop, (2) Glass screw top storage vials, magnifying tweezers, 14 inch gold pan, magnetic separator pick up tool, 8 inch gold pan, 1/2 inch and 1/8 inch mesh classifying screens === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 11pc Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens
